title: gastrochilus zhenyuanensis
intro: Gastrochilus zhenyuanensis, also known as the Zhenyuan lizard orchid, is a species of orchid native to the mountains of Yunnan Province in southwestern China. It has been found to have medicinal properties, including antiseptic and anti-inflammatory compounds, which are extracted from its rhizomes and used in traditional Chinese medicine. The health benefits of Gastrochilus zhenyuanensis include its ability to treat infections, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the rhizomes of Gastrochilus zhenyuanensis are often dried and ground into a powder, or made into decoctions and infusions, which are used to treat various health conditions.
